semantic_comment: Reads as cowork/team workflow rather than Claude-only long-context document reasoning.

visual_evidence: Google Cloud-style multicolor Vertex mark appears at top right, with databases, model graph, pipeline controls, deployment/output dashboards, and platform UI.

visual_evidence: Central chat assistant interface is connected to documents, code, cloud, database, tools, model layers, and user workstations.

visual_evidence: Large document stack, many text documents, chat/context panels, synthesized structured outputs, dashboard, and code artifacts.

visual_evidence: User prompt branches into multiple small agent lanes, then converges into a composed page/report with charts, cards, and generated output bundles.
